learningObjectives: Name common transport and places using Starters vocabulary.
Ask and answer where and what questions about places.
Use prepositions next to, behind and in front of to describe location.
Read simple directions and place descriptions.
Listen and identify transport and place names.
Talk about how you go to places and where things are.
grammarFocus: Prepositions: next to, behind, in front of

vocabularyBank.exampleSentence: My father has a red car.
I go to school by bus.
She rides her bike to the park.
The plane is in the sky.
The shop is on the street.
Our house is on this street.
The bus is on the road.
Our town has a big park.
The school is next to the park.
There is a tree in front of the house.

grammarReference.explanation: Use where to ask about place. Use what to ask about things or to identify something.
examples: What is this? — It is a bus.
commonMistakes: Where is a car? (×) when asking identity → What is this? (✓)
What is the park? (×) when asking place → Where is the park? (✓)

grammarReference.structure: Prepositions: next to, behind, in front of
grammarReference.explanation: Next to means beside. Behind means at the back. In front of means before something, facing it.
examples: The shop is next to the park.
The bus is behind the car.
The tree is in front of the house.
commonMistakes: in front the house (×) → in front of the house (✓)
next the shop (×) → next to the shop (✓)

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Transport and Places
lessons.learningObjective: Recognise and understand twelve transport and place words at Starters level.

exercises.title: Learn: Transport and Place Match
exercises.instructions: Read each sentence. Choose the best word.

questions.questionText: It has four wheels and a family rides in it. It is a _____.
questions.explanation: A car has four wheels and carries people. Bus is bigger; bike has two wheels.

choices.distractorNote: Also has wheels but is much bigger and public
Flies in the sky, not on wheels on the road

questions.questionText: Many people travel together on this big vehicle on the road. It is a _____.
questions.explanation: A bus carries many passengers on the road. Car is smaller; plane is in the air.

choices.distractorNote: Two wheels, one or two riders

questions.questionText: It flies in the sky and takes people to far places. It is a _____.
questions.explanation: A plane flies in the sky. Car and bus stay on the ground.

choices.distractorNote: On the road, not in the sky
On the road, not in the sky

questions.questionText: Children play on the grass and there are trees. This place is a _____.
questions.explanation: A park is an outdoor place with grass and trees for play. Shop sells things; house is where you live.

choices.distractorNote: Place to buy things, not to play on grass
Home, not a public play area

questions.questionText: You buy food and toys here. This place is a _____.
questions.explanation: A shop is where you buy things. Park is for playing; school is for learning.

choices.distractorNote: Road between buildings, not a store

questions.questionText: Cars and buses drive on the _____.
questions.explanation: A street (or road) is where vehicles drive. House is a building; tree is a plant.

exercises.title: Practice: Match the Pairs
exercises.instructions: Match each word on the left with the correct meaning on the right.

questions.questionText: Match the transport and place words to their meanings.
questions.explanation: Mỗi từ khớp với một nghĩa rõ ràng. House và shop đôi khi bị nhầm vì đều là tòa nhà.

pairs.right: a place with streets and shops

exercises.title: Check: Transport and Places Quiz
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer.

questions.explanation: Plane (máy bay) — bay trên trời.

choices.distractorNote: Đường phố — không phải phương tiện

questions.explanation: Park (công viên) — nơi chơi.

questions.questionText: Complete with transport or place words.
questions.explanation: bus/car cho phương tiện; shop/park cho địa điểm.

content.template: We go by [0]. The [1] is next to the park.

exercises.title: Review: Transport and Places Quiz
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer.

questions.explanation: Plane (máy bay) — bay trên trời.

choices.distractorNote: Đường phố — không phải phương tiện

questions.explanation: Park (công viên) — nơi chơi.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Transport
lessons.learningObjective: Name transport: car, bus, bike, plane and taxi.

questions.explanation: Bus — xe buýt.
Plane — máy bay.

questions.questionText: A _____ takes you quickly by road for money.
questions.explanation: Taxi — xe taxi trả phí.

questions.questionText: Match transport to how it moves.
questions.explanation: Ghép phương tiện với cách di chuyển.
Plane bay trên trời.
Car — xe ô tô.
Điền phương tiện phù hợp.

content.template: We go by [0]. Grandpa takes a [1] to the airport.

questions.explanation: Plane bay trên trời.
Car — xe ô tô.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Places
lessons.learningObjective: Use place words: house, park, shop, street and airport.

questions.explanation: House — ngôi nhà.
Park — công viên.
Shop — cửa hàng.
Ghép địa điểm với hoạt động.
Airport — sân bay.
Street — đường phố.

questions.questionText: Make a sentence about a place.
questions.explanation: The + park + is + next to + the + house.
Airport — sân bay.
Street — đường phố.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Where Is It?
lessons.learningObjective: Use where and what questions and prepositions next to, behind and in front of.

exercises.title: Learn: Choose Where or What
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct question word or preposition.

questions.questionText: _____ is the park? — It is on Green Street.
questions.explanation: Where hỏi về địa điểm. Câu trả lời nói về street nên dùng Where.

questions.questionText: _____ is this? — It is a bus.
questions.explanation: What hỏi để nhận diện vật. Câu trả lời It is a bus xác nhận điều này.

questions.questionText: The shop is _____ the park. (beside it)
questions.explanation: Next to nghĩa là bên cạnh. Behind là phía sau; in front of là phía trước.

questions.questionText: The car is _____ the bus. (at the back of the bus)
questions.explanation: Behind nghĩa là phía sau. In front of là phía trước; next to là bên cạnh.

exercises.title: Practice: Prepositions and Questions
exercises.instructions: Complete the sentences with next to, behind or in front of.

questions.questionText: Complete: The tree is [0] the house. | The school is [1] the park. | The bus is [2] the car.
questions.explanation: In front of cây trước nhà; next to trường cạnh công viên; behind xe buýt sau xe hơi.

content.template: The tree is [0] the house. The school is [1] the park. The bus is [2] the car.

questions.explanation: Where hỏi địa điểm.
In front of — phía trước nhà.
Where + to be; next to/behind cho vị trí.

content.template: [0] is the park? It is [1] the school.

questions.explanation: Where hỏi địa điểm.
In front of — phía trước nhà.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Where and What Questions
lessons.learningObjective: Ask where and what questions about places and transport.

questions.explanation: Where hỏi vị trí.

questions.questionText: _____ is that? — It is a red car.
questions.explanation: What hỏi vật/con gì.
Where cho nơi; What cho vật.

content.template: [0] is the shop? [1] is that blue bus?

questions.questionText: You want a place. You ask:
questions.explanation: Where + place.
What hỏi xe gì.
Where + is + the + shop?

questions.questionText: You want a place. You ask:
questions.explanation: Where + place.
What hỏi xe gì.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Next To, Behind, In Front Of
lessons.learningObjective: Use next to, behind and in front of to describe location.

questions.explanation: Next to — bên cạnh.
In front of — phía trước.
Next to/behind/in front of theo vị trí.

content.template: The school is [0] the park. Our house is [1] the school.

questions.explanation: In front of the door — trước cửa.

questions.questionText: Go straight. Turn left _____ the park.
questions.explanation: At the park — tại/rẽ tại công viên.

questions.questionText: The bus stop is _____ the shop.
questions.explanation: Next to the shop — cạnh cửa hàng.
In front of the door — trước cửa.

questions.questionText: Go straight. Turn left _____ the park.
questions.explanation: At the park — tại/rẽ tại công viên.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Around Town
lessons.learningObjective: Read simple directions and descriptions of places in town.

exercises.title: Learn: Read: My Town
exercises.instructions: Read the text. Then answer the questions.

passage.title: My Town
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Linh. I live in a small town.

My house is on Oak Street. There is a tree in front of my house. My school is next to the park. I walk to school every day.

On Main Street there is a shop. The shop is behind the bus stop. Many people go to the shop by bus.

On Sunday, my family goes to the park. We ride our bikes. I love my town!

questions.questionText: What is the main idea of the text?
questions.explanation: Linh mô tả nhà, trường, cửa hàng và công viên trong thị trấn của mình.

choices.text: Linh describes places in her town.
Linh talks about sports at school.
Linh describes animals in the park.

questions.explanation: Văn bản nói: My school is next to the park.

choices.distractorNote: Shop is behind bus stop, not school location
Tree is in front of house

questions.questionText: Why do many people go to the shop by bus?
questions.explanation: Cửa hàng ở Main Street và có bus stop gần đó — đi bus thuận tiện.

choices.text: The shop is on a street with a bus stop.
The shop is in the sky.
choices.distractorNote: Shops are on streets, not in sky

choices.text: There are no roads in the town.

questions.questionText: In 'There is a tree in front of my house', where is the tree?
questions.explanation: In front of nghĩa là phía trước — cây ở trước nhà Linh.

questions.questionText: Put the ideas in order: (1) Linh tells where she lives (2) Linh describes school and the shop (3) Linh talks about going to the park on Sunday
questions.explanation: Văn bản đi theo thứ tự: nhà → trường và cửa hàng → Chủ nhật ở công viên.

choices.distractorNote: Home comes before school and shop

exercises.title: Practice: Find Places in the Text

passage.title: Going to the Park
passage.text:
We live in a small house on this street. The park is next to our house.

We walk to the park. My father goes by bike. My mother takes the bus.

In the park we see birds and trees. The shop is behind the park.

Where is the car? It is in front of our house!

questions.explanation: The park is next to our house.
My father goes by bike.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Trip and Directions
lessons.learningObjective: Read simple directions and holiday travel texts.

passage.title: A Trip by Plane
passage.text:
We go on holiday. We take a taxi to the airport. Then we fly by plane!

The plane is big. We look down — there are houses and streets.

Grandma waits at her house. "Welcome!" she says. We are happy.

questions.questionText: How do they get to the airport?
questions.explanation: We take a taxi to the airport.
Grandma waits at her house.

passage.title: Find the Shop
passage.text:
Excuse me — where is the shop? Go straight. Turn left at the park.

The shop is next to the bus stop. The street is busy. I see a red car and a blue bus.

My house is behind the school. The bike is in front of the door.

Thank you! Now I know the way.

questions.explanation: Go straight.
The shop is next to the bus stop.

passage.title: Find the Shop

My house is behind the school. The bike is in front of the door.

Thank you! Now I know the way.

questions.explanation: My house is behind the school.

questions.questionText: The plane trip text is about _____.
questions.explanation: Bài về bay máy bay đi nghỉ.

lessons.title: Lesson 4: Going Places

script.title: On the Street
